name: Wilhelmina International, Inc.
summary: Wilhelmina International, Inc. is a fashion model and talent management company founded in 1967. Headquartered in New York City, it operates in Los Angeles, Miami, and London, representing approximately 1,700 active models, entertainers, athletes, and social media influencers. Services include booking advertising campaigns, catalog/e-commerce, runway, showroom, editorial work, and influencer marketing on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. The company also licenses the Wilhelmina name to third-party agencies and operates the Aperture division for film, television, and commercials.

products.name: Fashion Model Management
products.description: Representation and booking of fashion models across advertising, catalog, runway, showroom, and editorial markets.

products.name: Social Media Influencer Management
products.description: Talent promotion of products and services via Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube for brand campaigns.

products.name: Aperture Division
products.description: Represents actors and models for film, television, commercials, and influencers for brand campaigns.

products.name: Wilhelmina Licensing
products.description: Wholly-owned subsidiary that collects third-party licensing fees for use of the Wilhelmina name.

partnerships.description: Leading fashion model agencies in local U.S. and international markets license the Wilhelmina name.
